decision.decision: H1 is supported: the low-step LGSSM harness is under-converged.
decision.main_uncertainty: Whether tighter Sinkhorn changes the qualitative reset-moment pattern or merely attenuates the same barycentric contraction.
decision.next_justified_action: Update the harness budget/gate only after a follow-up reset covariance diagnostic, because H3 remains live.
decision.not_concluded: No gradient correctness, SIR correctness, HMC readiness, posterior correctness, production readiness, or broad scientific validity.
